front.title: Multi-channel Pixel Diagonal Flow (MPDF) Protocol Specification

abstract.t: This document updates the Deterministic Spatial Restoration Protocol (DSRP) specification by defining the low-level silicon memory pointer trajectories required to execute 4-to-1 Macro-Pixel Fusion. To achieve zero-CPU, hardware-wire speed execution and eliminate pipeline memory stalls, DSRP rejects single-row or single-column iterative scanning. This specification mandates a Dual-Row Parallel Shunt (DRPS) mechanism, where the hardware memory controller treats the 2D canvas as interlocking row-pairs, scanning horizontally with a 2-bit sliding window to output the 2-bit Absolute Gate Numbers within a single clock cycle.
